root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, count( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_contract ) as c_count, sum( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance ) as c_balance, sum( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_intarr ) as c_intarr, sum( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_shot ) as c_shot, sum( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_long ) as c_long, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.intarr_date
--, FPB_SKL_GET_MEMLOAN_BY_DATE( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code ) as c_mem_loan , to_char( FPB_SKL_GET_MEMLOAN_BY_DATE( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code ),'999,999,999,999') as c_mem_loan
FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code, sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loan_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.client_id = '000' ) ) and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code.loan_code_desc, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.intarr_date

r_ktm_mem_share_loan_bal1c_sum_nest.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status.member_status_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status.member_status_name, count( 1 ) as c_count, sum( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_balance ) as share_balance, sum( (CASE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex WHEN 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ) as c_man, '!balance_date_1!' as adtm_date FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_status_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status.member_status_code ) and ( ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.client_id = '000' ) AND ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date = {0} ) AND ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_balance > 0 ) ) GROUP BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status.member_status_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_status.member_status_name

r_ktm_mem_share_loan_bal1c_sum_nest_fund.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_insure_rule.insurance_type, sc_mem_m_insure_rule.insurance_desc , count( 1 ) as c_count, sum( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance ) as fund_amount , '!balance_date_1!' as adtm_date FROM sc_cls_confirm_data ,sc_mem_m_insure_rule WHERE sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = sc_mem_m_insure_rule.insurance_type and ( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'ISU' ) AND sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = {0} AND sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > 0 group by sc_mem_m_insure_rule.insurance_type, sc_mem_m_insure_rule.insurance_desc order by sc_mem_m_insure_rule.insurance_type
